title: Vertiv Reports Strong Second Quarter Results and Raises Full Year 2023 Outlook
text: COLUMBUS, Ohio--(BUSINESS WIRE)--Vertiv Holdings Co (NYSE: VRT), a global provider of critical digital infrastructure and continuity solutions, today reported financial results for its second quarter ended June 30, 2023. Vertiv reported second quarter net sales of $1,734 million, an increase of $335 million, or 24%, compared with last year's second quarter and a 25% organic net sales increase, which excludes the impact of foreign currency.
